title: TopBuild Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Key Financial Metrics: Revenue & Profitability: Q3 sales: $1.37 billion (up 3.6% YoY). Net income per diluted share: $5.65 (versus $5.27 in Q3 2023). Adjusted EBITDA: $285 million with 20.8% margin. Gross margin: 30.7% (down from 31.7% YoY). Segment Performance: Installation segment sales grew 4.2%. Specialty Distribution sales increased 5.1%. Installation operating profit declined 1.7% despite revenue growth. Capital Allocation: The company completed or announced seven acquisitions expected to generate approximately $118 million annually. During the quarter, TopBuild repurchased 1.07 million shares for $413.9 million, demonstrating confidence in operations. Forward Guidance: Management narrowed 2024 outlook to $5.3-$5.35 billion in revenue and $1.055-$1.085 billion in adjusted EBITDA, citing a continued uneven housing environment and the ongoing delay of certain commercial/industrial projects. Market Response: The stock gained 4.30% on the earnings announcement, reflecting moderate investor approval of the results and capital deployment strategy.
